strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with core stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Direct AI agent development experience — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong testing/craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test libraries and testing workshops
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned, a primary framework for the role
No explicit Vitest/Jest/Playwright evidence; testing depth shown in D and Selenium rather than the listed JS frameworks
No Kotlin or Python listed; Java experience appears dated (robotics work 2016-2018)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and listed testing frameworks

response.justification: The candidate far exceeds the 6+ years requirement with strong evidence on the primary stack: TypeScript/React/MongoDB/AWS CDK at Optilyz, Node/TypeScript/GraphQL with TDD and CI/CD at RIDE, and current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq covering the required AI agent development skill. Cloud and containerization are evidenced by AWS CDK and Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective; databases by MongoDB/MySQL; Git and polyglot proficiency (JS/TS, Java, D, C++, Swift) are well documented, and a CS bachelor's meets the education bar. Gaps are secondary: Nest.js is absent, Vitest/Jest/Playwright are not named despite a deep testing culture, and Kotlin/Python are missing. Security/auth expertise is not explicitly evidenced. These are learnable framework-level gaps against otherwise strong competency coverage.
